exercises.code:
# revisión escéptica s20/S20-T2-A-E3
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, coord):
    c = ws[coord]
    c.font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    c.fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = "H"
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)
_j2_chk = 'S20-T2-A-E3'

# revisión escéptica s20/S20-T3-A-E3
def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) < tol

print(reconcile(22.0, 23.0))

exercises.code:
# revisión escéptica s20/S20-T4-B-E2
import hashlib

def dig(rows):
    s = "\\n".join(f"{a},{b}" for a, b in sorted(rows))
    return hashlib.sha1(s.encode()).hexdigest()
print(dig([("Lima", 1), ("Cusco", 2)]) == dig([("Cusco", 2), ("Lima", 1)]))
_j2_chk = 'S20-T4-B-E2'
